merriment-social.name: Merriment Social
merriment-social.summary: Strong positive sentiment. Wedding/event group praised service highly. Minor complaint about 3% surcharge — should ensure staff proactively waives or communicates this.

third-coast.name: Third Coast Provisions
third-coast.summary: Generally positive but Korinne Mack 2★ (solo diner ignored at bar, food oversalted) is a notable service failure. Consistent note: salty seasoning on scallop/pothole dishes. Worth flagging to kitchen and bar staff.

flourchild.name: Flourchild Pizza
flourchild.summary: 4 of 5 reviews are 5★. Jim Whitaker 2★ is a recurring theme (crust quality). Praised items: King Cheese, Curd Your Enthusiasm, garlic sticks, Crab Rangoon spring rolls.

loon-room.name: The Loon Room
loon-room.summary: Excellent sentiment. Bartenders (Ethan, Mitchell, Majir) consistently praised by name. Nick Wolf Valentine's special note: disclose entree restrictions upfront for ticketed events.

notes: No new reviews detected vs previous run (6 hours ago). All review content identical. Persistent ≤2★ reviews (Third Coast: Korinne Mack, Flourchild: Jim Whitaker) remain unaddressed — consider response queue.
